data.title: 国际服网页活动「Special Summer Mission! Capture a Rabbit!」
data.summary: [Web Event Notice] Spend 5 unforgettable days with the RABBIT Squad! See a new episode with a squad
data.body:
[Web Event Notice]

Spend 5 unforgettable days with the RABBIT Squad!
See a new episode with a squad member and get an event gift each day.

🗓️Event Schedule: 12/26 (Tue) 3:00 AM – 2024/1/9 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2450365
